Capabilities
  • 🔗 Bind X browser session to local AI agents
  • 📖 Read home timeline & search results
  • 👤 Fetch user profile information
  • ⚡ Execute actions (like, retweet, follow, post)
  • 🌐 Open and navigate X tabs on demand
  • 💎 Saves AI token costs via local bridging
